message:
feat(demo): add inline-auto screen mode with dynamic height calculation

Add a new 'inline-auto' screen mode that automatically calculates the
optimal UI height based on terminal dimensions, bounded by configurable
min/max values.

New CLI options:
- --screen-mode=inline-auto: Enable automatic height calculation
- --ui-min-height=N: Minimum UI height (default: 12 rows)
- --ui-max-height=N: Maximum UI height (default: 40 rows)

New environment variables:
- FTUI_DEMO_UI_MIN_HEIGHT: Override --ui-min-height
- FTUI_DEMO_UI_MAX_HEIGHT: Override --ui-max-height

The inline-auto mode is useful for:
- Embedded terminal scenarios (e.g., IDE integrated terminals)
- Responsive TUI applications that adapt to available space
- Testing at various terminal sizes without explicit height flags

The height calculation respects terminal resize events and adjusts the
rendering area accordingly while staying within the configured bounds.

Also includes minor app.rs updates for screen mode handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
